<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements; use Spatie\Html\BaseElement; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Disabled; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Name; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Type; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Value; class Button extends BaseElement { use Disabled; use Value; use Name; use Type; protected $tag = 'button'; }
